stepBasicsDesc: Provide the essential information about your course
stepCurriculumDesc: Define what students will learn and prerequisites
stepPricingDesc: Set the pricing and availability of your course
stepMediaDesc: Add visual elements to make your course stand out
titleMinLength: Title must be at least 10 characters
fieldDescriptionPh: Describe your course in detail (minimum 100 characters)
descriptionMinLength: Description must be at least 100 characters
fieldWhatLearnHint: List the key learning objectives and outcomes (minimum 50 characters)
fieldWhatLearnPh: Describe what students will learn from this course
whatYouWillLearnMinLength: Learning objectives must be at least 50 characters
fieldRequirementsPh: List any prerequisites or requirements for this course
fieldLongDescriptionPh: Write a comprehensive description of your course
priceRequired: Price is required for paid courses
priceMin: Price must be at least 1 EGP
fieldFreeHint: Toggle to make this course available for free
fieldThumbnailHint: Upload a high-quality image that represents your course
thumbnailImagesOnly: Only JPEG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images are allowed
thumbnailMaxSize: Image size must be less than 5MB
saveCourseHintDesc: Your course data is automatically saved when you click Save. You can continue editing later from your course dashboard.
freeCourseBenefitsDesc: Free courses help you reach a wider audience and showcase your expertise. You can always switch to a paid model later.
discountPriceLaterHint: You can add a discount price later from the course settings.
curriculumTipsDesc: Clear learning objectives help students understand what they'll gain. List tangible skills and outcomes they can expect.
saveFailed: Failed to save course. Please try again.
validationError: Please fix the errors before continuing.
validationRequired: Title, description, and subject are required.
noProfileDesc: To create or edit courses, you need to set up your teacher profile first.
notVerifiedDesc: Your profile needs to be verified before you can create courses.
pendingVerification: Your verification is pending. You will be notified once your profile is verified.
networkErrorDesc: We're having trouble connecting to the server. Please check your internet connection.
planRequiredDesc: You need an active subscription plan to create courses. Please choose a plan to continue.
submitReviewDesc: Add any notes for the reviewer about your course.
publishNotReady: Complete all required sections before submitting
builderHint: Add sections, lectures, and resources in the Course Builder
tip1: Start with a clear, descriptive title that grabs attention
tip2: Use a professional thumbnail to increase click-through rates
tip3: Break down complex topics into organized sections
tip4: Include practical examples and real-world applications
loadingCourseError: Failed to load course. Please try again.
loadCategoriesError: Failed to load categories. Please refresh the page.
courseCreatedSuccessDesc: Your course has been created. Now you can add curriculum content.
nextStepAddSections: Add sections to organize your content
nextStepAddLectures: Create lectures with video and materials
nextStepAddResources: Add resources like code files, articles, or guides
nextStepSubmitReview: Submit for review when you're ready
